ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* URL of the movie's homepage */,
  "original_language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget for the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the movie (e.g., Released) */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "tmdb_id" TEXT /* TMDB ID of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was assigned to the movie */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the production company */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the production company is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the production company was assigned to the movie */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the production company assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the production country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the production country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_countries" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the production country was assigned to the movie */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the production country assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spoken_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spoken language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the spoken language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the spoken language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_spoken_languages" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spoken language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spoken language was assigned to the movie */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spoken language assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_member" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "profile_path" TEXT /* URL of the cast member's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cast member was assigned to the movie */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cast member assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the movie */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_versions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the movie */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes of the movie */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes of the movie */,
  "watch_time" INTEGER /* Total watch time of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_analytics_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
